titlestmt.titleproper: Ithaca Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Task Force records7571
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Ezra Corral

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-08-04 00:10:13 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Ithaca Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Task Force records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Ithaca Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Task Force (Ithaca, N.Y.)

did.abstract: Correspondence, press releases, original layouts, and other working files from the publication of "OUTLINES: A Newsletter for Ithaca's Lesbian, Gay and Bisexual Community," from the first issue, Dec. 1984 to #23, April/May 1989, and from 1993-1998. Plus, the Ithaca Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Task Force's publication of local businesses and organizations and mailings sent to members, 1991-2005 (incomplete). One issue of the Big Red Rag.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Andrea HektorPeter Martinez, June 2003Rima Turner, November 2005Ezra Corral, July 2008 Christine Bonilha, September 2011

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, press releases, original layouts, and other working files from the publication of "OUTLINES: A Newsletter for Ithaca's Lesbian, Gay and Bisexual Community," from the first issue, Dec. 1984 to #23, April/May 1989, and from 1993-1998. Plus, the Ithaca Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Task Force's publication of local businesses and organizations and mailings sent to members, 1991-2005 (incomplete). One issue of the Big Red Rag.

list.head: The following materials have been cataloged separately:
list.item: Baltimore Gaypaper, May, June, September, and October 1989.
Outlines, February/March 1987, February/March/April 1988, Winter Eternal (1988), February/March 1989, April/May 1989, Summer 1989, September 1989, December 1991.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Ithaca Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Task Force records, #7571. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Please Add Us to Your Mailing List
Change of Address Notices, August 1997 onward
A Celebration of Black History Month
Afro-American and White American Women- Culture, Community, and Organizing
An Interview with Author Penny Hayes
An Open Letter to My White American Gay and Lesbian Friends
Cornell Does the Right Thing- Finally
15 Things You Can Do When a Friend Has AIDS
ILGTF Forms Lesbian and Gay Speakers Bureau
Out of the Closet and Into the Stacks
Tompkins County Task Force for Battered Women
When Statistics Become Real- Bias-Related Violence
Your Own Backyard/The Campaign to End Homophobia
Picnic Protest- An Open Letter to the Ithaca Gay and Lesbian Community
Community- Newsletter of the Capital District Lesbian and Gay Community Center
National Gay and Lesbian Task Force
The Ithaca Fair Practices Ordinance- Making It Work
NY State Lesbian and Gay Lobby
Office of the Mayor- San Francisco- Unmarried Partners Bill Signed
Proposed Law on Bias-Related Violence- New York
Series II. Ithaca Lesbian/Gay/Bisexual Task Force Calendars
Suzanne Reiner: ILGBTF non-profit status--presentation to board
Donation form, comment form, thank you
Series VIII. Articles and Source Materials
Winter articles, advertisements, source materials, etc.
Series X. Information From Other Organizations
"Queer Survivors: A Conference on Abuse and Sexual Identity" (Lesbian Gay Bisexual Resource Office--Cornell University)
Pride Agenda Flyer "Governor Pataki Vetoes Historic $2 Million in Lesbian and Gay Health and Human Services Funding from the State Budget"
Speakers List(Cornell University Lesbian, Bisexual and Gay Studies)
Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual Awareness Month at Cornell: Gaypril '92 Calendar
March for Women's Lives (Tompkins County NOW)
Night of 100 Parties/Annual Brunch (Empire State Pride Agenda)
Leadership Training for people who are actively working on LGBT issues or who would like to be.(Empire State Pride Agenda)
Human Services Coalition of Tompkins County
Series XI. Back Issues of Outlines
Summer 1994--Outlines--originals, also Stonewall 25 fliers, originals, samples
Spring 1995--Outlines--originals (Lizard ad. Removed, page 4, used on Summer 1995)
Summer 1995--Outlines--originals (Ads removed: Lizard page 23 on Fall 1995; Gay Gospel Music page 16 used on Winter 1995)
Fall 1995--Outlines--originals (Removed ads: STAP page 9; relationship counseling page 17; Snyder page 9)
Summer 1996--Outlines--originals (Removed ads: Yahn page 11; Morris page 5 [used on Fall 1996]; Common Ground page 32 [used on Winter 1996])
Fall 1996--Outlines--originals (Removed ads: STAP page 21; Yahn page 23 [used on Winter 1996])
Winter 1996--Outlines--originals (Removed: STAP ad page 8 [used on Spring 1997])
Spring 1997--Outlines--originals (Removed Ads for Summer 1997: First Baptist page 12; Heartwood page 21; Barringer page 31; Foree page 17; STAP page 26)

Summer 1997--Outlines--originals (Removed ads for Fall 1997 issue: Cayuga Fitness Center page 12; Barringer page 34; First Baptist page 5; Foree page 22; Milner page 15; Planned Parenthood page 3; Saunders page 34; STAP page 28)
Outlines issues with editorial notes from Migdalia Valdes
The Big Red Rag Rough Draft Layouts (hand drawn)
Not Your Mom's Prom (Gaypril 4 9pm to 1am Ithaca Youth Bureau)
Ages and Stages in the Lives of Lesbian, Gays and Bisexuals
Letter to citizens of Ithaca who will cote in three new members of the Ithaca School Board
Ithaca Lesbian Gay Bisexual Task Force Mailings, 1991-1992
Ithaca Lesbian Gay Bisexual Task Force Mailings, 1996-1999
Ithaca Lesbian Gay Bisexual Transgender Task Force Mailings, September 2005
Ithaca Lesbian Gay Bisexual Transgender Task Force website

did.unittitle: March Perspectives: Taking it to the Streets (March on Washington October 11, 1987)
